steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The phrase “ensuring that the trail would not be sold or commercially developed” reveals the purpose — Congress needed to prevent commercial exploitation of the areas.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content:
Protect expresses the idea of preventing harm and keeping something safe. The other three choices—borrowing, postponing, or decorating—don't fit this meaning or intent.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
